title: Dynasty World Issue Coming Soon
content: We are finalized on replacing the main cover art and broadcast video with blacked-out 'Coming Soon' states as we prepare for the physical launch. Get ready for the complete visual reveal.

title: Limited T-Shirts & Signed Posters
content: We are dropping a limited collection of 10 heavyweight black T-shirts for sale at launch, along with 50 limited signed cover posters. All pieces will be serialized and signed.

title: Techno/Animal Spirit Alignment
content: Bridging the ancient ancestral plane with the cold, precise grid of modern digital cybernetics. High-fashion rituals from Pretoria to the world.

title: Bookings & Collaborations
content: For all bookings and creative collaborations, reach out to the editorial team via email at: sondynastyent@gmail.com. New music visualizer drops after launch.
